properties.name: embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable text embedding auto-configuration.

properties.name: embedding.provider
properties.description: Text embedding provider. Use djl for local inference or openai-compatible for a delegated /v1/embeddings endpoint.

properties.name: embedding.text-model-url
properties.description: Remote identifier or URL for the text embedding model.

properties.name: embedding.fail-on-missing-model
properties.description: Fail application startup when no embedding model can be loaded.

properties.name: embedding.embedding-dimension
properties.description: Expected embedding dimension for diagnostic logging.

properties.name: embedding.image-input-size
properties.description: Target input size (pixels) for vision models.

properties.name: embedding.pooling-mode
properties.description: Pooling strategy for the DJL text translator.

properties.name: embedding.query-prefix
properties.description: Prefix added to query text when generating embeddings.

properties.name: embedding.passage-prefix
properties.description: Prefix added to passage text when generating embeddings.

properties.name: embedding.engine
properties.description: Engine name supplied to DJL when loading models.

properties.name: embedding.vision-model-url
properties.description: Remote identifier or URL for the image embedding model.

properties.name: embedding.openai.base-url
properties.description: Base URL for an OpenAI-compatible embeddings API, without the /embeddings suffix.

properties.name: embedding.openai.api-key
properties.description: Bearer token sent to the OpenAI-compatible embeddings API.

properties.name: embedding.openai.model
properties.description: Embedding model name exposed by the OpenAI-compatible embeddings API.

properties.name: embedding.openai.timeout
properties.description: Timeout for OpenAI-compatible embeddings API requests.
